word: G5396 - φλυαρέω - phlyaréō - floo-ar-eh'-o - Prate against

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to utter nonsense, talk idly, prate
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5397; to be a babbler or trifler, that is, (by implication) to berate idly or mischievously: - prate against.
